name: Alluva
description: Developer of an analyst marketplace designed to discover investment opportunities. The company's platform quantitatively and qualitatively rates cryptocurrencies by using a contributor model that rewards users for correct calls, enabling investors with an improved market movement understanding.

name: AMPAworks
description: Developer of AI algorithms tools intended to increase efficiency in healthcare systems and services. The company's tools provide workflow tasks, account for inventory used during patient-related tasks, and provide feedback to team members, enabling healthcare companies to promote safety and hospitals to improve quality and track inventory and supply chains.

name: Beatdapp
description: Operator of a SaaS-based platform intended to help music labels and artists track their songs to collect royalties. The company's tracking system authenticates, verifies, and validates media streamed in real-time and reduces the tracking discrepancies between Digital Service Providers (DSPs) and rights holders, enabling DSPs to increase their royalty revenue for rights holders while limiting legal exposure to royalty lawsuits.

name: Blackcart
description: Developer of an e-commerce artificial intelligence (AI) platform designed to transform an online store into an at-home showroom. The company's platform offers customers to try on items from their favorite brands at home using AI tools without an upfront commitment, enabling businesses to increase sales by offering a try before you buy experience to their customers.

name: Blue Studios.io, BlueStudios
description: Developer of a Web3 family crypto wallet designed to create opportunities for families to come together to plan, invest, learn, and play. The company's platform provides families with tools and software to reimagine what families can do together with money and assets, enabling families to get empowered to be the custodians of their data and wealth.

name: Blue Wire
description: Developer of a sports podcasting platform intended to bring together a new generation of creators to create audio content. The company's network is made up of journalists, former athletes, and influential fans, building sports podcasting channels on various sports leagues and college football and soccer markets, enabling users to get updates about the sports.

name: Bytez
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence research and development pipeline intended to help AI builders discover, demo, and deploy the AI solution. The company offers organized research papers rank-wise which are available as Python notebooks, it makes open-source AI accessible and actionable, enabling developers and big data experts to stay on the cutting edge of algorithms and models by reaching out to recent discoveries and information in various areas.

name: ChemTech AI
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence-based platform designed to predict parameters and automate decision-making. The company's platform uses machine learning technologies to improve unit capacity, product yield, and quality, decrease energy consumption as well and predict the values of key technological parameters, enabling manufacturing plant operators to make an additional profit from the existing unit without further capital investments and cloud connection.

name: Curie
description: Developer of a 3D product generation platform designed to offer 3D shopping assistance. The company's platform allows shoppers to discover the best reviews and product news at the point of a camera, enabling customers to instantly educate and consense information and make purchases.

name: Docket Technologies
description: Developer of a centralized platform designed to check the status of matters, monitor key information, and gain deep analytics into the legal department. The company's platform tracks team key performance indicators, and key matter data, prepares for board meetings in one click as well, and helps to make data-driven decisions about legal spending, enabling clients to manage workload and generate reports automatically.

name: EINO
description: The Connectivity Digital Twin

name: EZ Farming
description: Operator of a farm acceleration digital platform intended to offer agricultural investment opportunities connecting small farmers with industrial investors. The company's platform seeks to pull investments from within the continent and the Diaspora to transform small farms into commercial sizes and empower youths in agriculture by equipping the next generation of farmers, enabling smallholder farmers to finance their businesses fast and find produce buyers.

name: Fitzy
description: Operator of an open internet TV platform designed to watch and record internet TV channel that supports online streaming in a single user interface on Smart TV device. The company's web crawler scans the internet for the best channels, enabling users to unlock paid content with their subscription services and enjoy a selection of free internet television.

name: Glyph
description: Manufacturer of footwear products intended to sell hand-knitted shoes. The company offers shoes whose upper portion is constructed from a blend of knitted fibers and is fully recyclable thus making them lighter, and more flexible, and ensuring that the shoes will last for a longer period of time, enabling customers to buy hand-knitted shoes for more comfort and style.

name: Innertrends
description: Developer of a data analytics platform designed to improve the onboarding experience for new users. The company's platform uses machine learning and data science algorithms to expose behavioral patterns in SaaS products, enabling companies to engage and retain customers improve user acquisition, and increase revenues.

name: Kiki
description: Developer of a social application designed to connect like-minded real people to enjoy nearby experiences. The company's application permits users to search for a companion and organize plans with them, enabling users to make new friends and cultivate beautiful relationships.

name: LucidAct
description: Developer of an enterprise platform intended to expedite healthcare management. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence to offer chronic care management, insurance checklist automation, and remote patient tracking management, enabling healthcare professionals to manage more patients and facilitate their operations.

name: Nanno
description: Developer of an online on-demand application designed to find and book a babysitter. The company's platform allows to browse, shortlist, book, and pay babysitters as well as performs background checking of every sitter listed on the platform, enabling parents to book vetted sitters from their phone or computer and keep their children safe at home.

name: Podcorn
description: Operator of a self-service marketplace intended for podcast sponsorships.

name: Resonado Labs
description: Developer of audio technology tools intended to reimage the way people experience sound. The company provides proprietary audio technology tools that enable Business-to-Business customers to realize the coexistence of design innovation and superior performance in their audio products, enabling clients to design innovative audio products while maintaining high-fidelity acoustic performance.

name: Rovilus
description: Developer of battery technologies designed to accelerate the adoption of clean energy. The company's technologies develop products that use thermal management technology to provide batteries made of fire-suppression material and have an extended lifetime, enabling companies to increase their operational efficiency and reduce their total cost of operation.

name: Tradespace
description: Developer of intellectual property (IP) software intended to buy, sell and license IP. The company's software uses predictive analytics to connect IP generators with partners that are looking for technology, enabling companies to make good IP strategy decisions without relying on expensive consultants, brokers, and lawyers.

name: Visionful
description: Developer of monitoring and management system designed to connect the parking and curbsides data with autonomous vehicles. The company's system provides businesses with information for parking guidance, parking enforcement and transportation analytics in real-time for smart cities, enabling clients to automate parking and transportation management

name: Newoldstamp
description: Developer of an email signature platform designed to turn employee's email into a powerful marketing tool. The company's platform offers to engage every promising personality or business to the digital world and help to strengthen their brand image by using a catchy email signature, enabling clients to empower their daily email activities with new possibilities to drive traffic and growth.

name: Nanogrid
description: Provider of an online platform intended to offer electrification through software intelligence for electric vehicle owners.The company's platform features centralized intelligence for distributed energy devices through benchmarking, prediction and improved performance, allowing customers to set up their homes to gain cheap, green electricity for their electric vehicle.

name: Gentem
description: Developer of a medical platform intended to help physicians with instant reimbursements. The company's offerings include connecting, processing and receiving payment for their claims, enabling medical practitioners to get their money without any administrative cost.

name: RestAR
description: Developer of a cloud-based 3D scanning and AR technology intended to convert physical products into the content. The company's software combines both computer vision and deep learning algorithms based on cutting-edge academic research where owners to scan and render high-quality 3D content based on physical products in e-commerce and food markets using a mobile device, enabling business to enhance the consumers' overall experience.
